violations.text: The handwashing sink in the restroom was lacking signage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

A hole was observed in the ceiling of the mop sink closet. Outer openings in a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by using tight-fitting doors and sealed structural components. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
The hand-washing sink in the restroom was lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

Milk and cream was observed held at 47-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

Hole observed in ceiling of mop sink closet. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025
Refrigerator located in the basement area was not in good repair, ambient observed at 46F. PIC called for service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator in the basement has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the downstairs bread refrigerator and mini freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

Food was observed held at 46-50 degrees Fahrenheit in the bar low boy unit #1. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had be in there since the day prior. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal). The bar low boy unit had an ambient air temperature of 47 degrees Fahrenheit. The unit was taken out of service for storage of time/temperature control for safety foods and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Unit must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

Food was observed not marked with the date of preparation in the prep unit. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

The cutting board on the prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, downstairs bread refrigerator, and mini freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

The floor under the bar and prep unit in the kitchen has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
